name: thumbforge-ai
description: ThumbForge AI - SaaS para criação de thumbnails com IA

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @thumbforge/shared build && concurrently -k -n shared,backend,worker,frontend "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/backend worker:dev" "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/frontend dev"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n backend,worker,frontend "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/backend start" "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/backend worker:start" "pnpm --filter @thumbforge/frontend start"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
